narration: What if I told you AI doesn’t think, it predicts?
visual_description: Hook visual: What if I told you AI doesn’t think, it predicts?
ai_image_prompt: Hook visual: What if I told you AI doesn’t think, it predicts?
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Hook visual: What if I told you AI doesn’t think, it predicts?

narration: Large language models, like transformers, work with tokens—think of them as puzzle pieces.
visual_description: Context visual: Large language models, like transformers, work with tokens—think of them as puzzle pieces.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: Large language models, like transformers, work with tokens—think of them as puzzle pieces.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: Large language models, like transformers, work with tokens—think of them as puzzle pieces.

narration: They use attention mechanisms to focus on relevant pieces, predicting the next token based on context.
visual_description: Escalation visual: They use attention mechanisms to focus on relevant pieces, predicting the next token based on context.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: They use attention mechanisms to focus on relevant pieces, predicting the next token based on context.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: They use attention mechanisms to focus on relevant pieces, predicting the next token based on context.

narration: But here's the catch: they can hallucinate, generating false information.
visual_description: Evidence visual: But here's the catch: they can hallucinate, generating false information.
ai_image_prompt: Evidence visual: But here's the catch: they can hallucinate, generating false information.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: But here's the catch: they can hallucinate, generating false information.

narration: So while they're powerful, they don’t 'understand'—they just predict.
visual_description: Payoff visual: So while they're powerful, they don’t 'understand'—they just predict.
ai_image_prompt: Payoff visual: So while they're powerful, they don’t 'understand'—they just predict.
